title: How to access parameters within non-imported package

features.name: package with verilator public localparam not imported into design
features.description: Code should include a package containing a localparam marked with /*verilator public*/ comment, where the package is never imported into any module in the design

features.name: package importing other packages
features.description: Code should include a package that imports symbols from other packages using import statement, where the importing package itself is not used in the design
